summary: A solid soundboard capture of the Richfield run that delivers a good overall show with strong opening and closing numbers.
review: The recording is praised as sounding great, indicating a clean soundboard source. The concert itself is described as a good show overall, with the reviewer noting the strongest material at the beginning and end of the set. No specific songs or individual performances are highlighted.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑rating review (3 stars) is available; it praises the recording quality and the show overall but provides no detail on standout performances, leading to a modest combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer says "Sounds great!" and mentions the magnetic tape (Mags) sound quality positively; no issues reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The reviewer likens the set to a sandwich with the 'meat' on the outsides, implying strong opening and closing songs but a weaker middle section.
